mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT u.id AS user_id FROM user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.last_login_time IS NOT NULL AND DATE(u.last_login_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT pr.user_id FROM practice_record pr WHERE DATE(pr.create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT pr.user_id FROM practice_detail pd JOIN practice_record pr ON pd.record_id = pr.id WHERE DATE(pd.create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT er.user_id FROM exam_record er WHERE DATE(er.create_time) = CURDATE() OR DATE(er.end_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT er.user_id FROM exam_answer ea JOIN exam_record er ON ea.exam_id = er.id WHERE DATE(ea.create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT acl.user_id FROM ai_call_log acl WHERE acl.call_type = 'USER' AND acl.user_id IS NOT NULL AND DATE(acl.create_time) = CURDATE() UNION SELECT f.user_id FROM favorite f WHERE DATE(f.create_time) = CURDATE() ) t
SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_detail WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_answer WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) )
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM user WHERE deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT date, SUM(cnt) AS count FROM ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM practice_detail WHERE DATE(create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) UNION ALL SELECT DATE(ea.create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM exam_answer ea WHERE DATE(ea.create_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(ea.create_time) ) t GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT qb.id AS bankId, qb.name AS bankName, IFNULL(t.total, 0) AS totalCount FROM question_bank qb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM ( SELECT bank_id FROM practice_record UNION ALL SELECT bank_id FROM exam_record ) a GROUP BY bank_id ) t ON qb.id = t.bank_id WHERE qb.deleted = 0 ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT f.question_id AS questionId, q.content AS questionContent, COUNT(*) AS favoriteCount FROM favorite f JOIN question q ON f.question_id = q.id AND q.deleted = 0 GROUP BY f.question_id, q.content ORDER BY favoriteCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
